summary.en: UN 38.3 is required for lithium batteries, battery packs and power banks. For Senegal shipments, align these results with Dakar logistics controls and importer handover requirements.
summary.zh: UN 38.3适用于锂电池、电芯和移动电源。面向塞内加尔时还需与达喀尔物流控制和进口商交接要求对齐。
summary.zht: UN 38.3適用於鋰電池、電芯和行動電源。面向塞內加爾時還需與達喀爾物流控制和進口商交接要求對齊。

summary.en: China applies UN 38.3 and domestic dangerous-goods frameworks for export. This is necessary baseline support but does not fully replace Senegal arrival-side logistics control.
summary.zh: 中国对出口采用UN 38.3及危险品运输体系，属于必要基础，但不能完全替代塞内加尔到岸物流控制。
summary.zht: 中國對出口採用UN 38.3及危險品運輸體系，屬於必要基礎，但不能完全替代塞內加爾到岸物流控制。

gap.en: Transport test standards are largely aligned. The gap is destination-side documentation and process fit, including French packets, Dakar point handling, and onward local transfer. Senegal has no direct EU-like horizontal regime reflected in transport checks here.
gap.zh: 运输测试标准大体一致，差距在于目的地文件和流程匹配，包括法文资料、达喀尔口岸操作及内陆接续转运。该情境下未体现欧盟式横向运输制度。
gap.zht: 運輸測試標準大體一致，差距在於目的地文件和流程匹配，包括法文資料、達喀爾口岸操作及內陸接續轉運。該情境下未體現歐盟式橫向運輸制度。

mandatory_status.target: UN 38.3 mandatory for international movement and Senegal route handling is mandatory in local chain.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in Chinese export logistics where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 records valid and map them to Senegal route controls. Practical compliance is mostly destination documentation and importer coordination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 保持UN 38.3记录有效并映射到塞内加尔运输控制。实践合规核心在于目的地文件和进口商协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 保持UN 38.3記錄有效並映射到塞內加爾運輸控制。實踐合規核心在於目的地文件和進口商協調。
